description: The corporate compliance department has flagged multiple suspected policy violations in the HR system and requires an immediate audit. Using Oracle SQL Developer connected to the HR schema (hr/hr123): (1) investigate the EMPLOYEES table to identify all employees whose current salary falls outside the minimum or maximum bounds defined for their job title in the JOBS table — the JOBS table has MIN_SALARY and MAX_SALARY columns; (2) examine the EXPENSE_REPORTS table for any duplicate submission patterns where the same employee submitted identical expense records; (3) create a PL/SQL trigger named SALARY_AUDIT_TRG on the HR.EMPLOYEES table that fires AFTER UPDATE OF SALARY for each row, logging the employee_id, old salary value, new salary value, the current database user (USER), and the current timestamp into the SALARY_CHANGE_LOG table which has already been created; and (4) export a combined compliance findings report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/audit_findings.csv containing your findings. System credentials if needed: system/OraclePassword123.
